query: INSERT INTO ransomware_groups (groupName, aliases, description, activityScore, trend, rwThreatLevel, victims7d, victims30d, totalVictims, topSectors, topCountries, associatedMalware, mitreTechniques, ransomwareFamily, extortionModel, affiliateProgram, knownInfrastructure, notableAttacks, rwFirstSeen, rwLastActive, calderaActorId, rwDataSource, rwConfidence) VALUES ('FULCRUMSEC', '["The Threat Thespians", "FulcrumSec"]', 'Data extortion group operating a steal-then-threaten model. Publishes victims on DLS, DarkForums, and Telegram. Known for cloud infrastructure exploitation (AWS). Sources: dailydarkweb.net, WatchGuard, KrakenLabs.', 78, 'surging', 'high', 1, 4, 5, '["Legal & Professional Services", "Electronics", "FinTech", "Military/Industrial"]', '["United States", "Australia", "United Kingdom"]', '[]', '["T1190", "T1078", "T1078.004", "T1530", "T1537", "T1552.005", "T1552.001", "T1580", "T1619", "T1087.004"]', 'Data Broker', 'double', false, '["https://fulcrumsec.net", "http://gsgot6tua7ffammwdv6vpxkog32b4z7qivtqkxz55afq2hkt2o24w5yd.onion", "https://t.me/fulcrumsec", "fulcrumsec@tuta.io", "threatspians@fulcrumsec.net"]', '[{"victim":"Avnet","sector":"Electronics","country":"United States","date":"2025-09-26","dataSize":"850GB"},{"victim":"youX","sector":"FinTech","country":"Australia","date":"2025-10","dataSize":"300GB"},{"victim":"Raptor Supplies","sector":"Military/Industrial","country":"United Kingdom","date":"2025-11"},{"victim":"LexisNexis","sector":"Legal & Professional Services","country":"United States","date":"2026-03-03","dataSize":"2.04GB"}]', '2025-09', '2026-03', 'fulcrumsec', 'osint', 90) ON DUPLICATE KEY UPDATE trend='surging', rwThreatLevel='high', totalVictims=5, rwLastActive='2026-03';
